expectations.text: Describes the likely effect as neutral-to-positive if used intelligently
expectations.evidence: States it's a 'useful supplementary tool' but less efficient than conventional loading.

expectations.text: Warns against adding too much band/chain tension that makes lockout the limiter
expectations.evidence: Notes increased lockout load while reduced bottom load.

expectations.text: Notes that reducing loading in stretched positions may reduce hypertrophy stimulus
expectations.evidence: States: 'stretched position contributes disproportionately to muscle damage and growth signaling.'

expectations.text: Acknowledges direct hypertrophy data are sparse
expectations.evidence: Does not explicitly note sparseness of direct AR hypertrophy data.

expectations.text: Recommends moderate accommodating resistance with full-ROM challenge maintained
expectations.evidence: States: 'maintaining full, controlled range of motion' is key.
